name: Otto Travel
description: Search, compare, and book flights and hotels through Otto. Plan trips in natural language, see fare and room options side-by-side, and confirm bookings with PNR — all from your OpenClaw session. Includes loyalty program tracking (frequent flyer, hotel chain) and travel preference storage. OAuth device-flow authorization; tokens refresh automatically.

serverUrl.description: Otto MCP server URL. Defaults to https://api.ottotheagent.com/mcp.
